# Horizon Care Services

> Healthcare staffing agency supplying vetted health and social care professionals to local authorities, NHS trusts, care homes, supported living providers, residential services, and healthcare organisations across England. Company No. 14615041.

Horizon Care Services Ltd is a healthcare staffing agency. We supply registered nurses, social workers, occupational therapists, physiotherapists, healthcare assistants, and support workers to organisations that need staffing cover — including urgent, planned, and longer-term placements.

We do not market direct care packages to families or individuals through this website. Our services are aimed at organisations that need staff.

## Services

- [Healthcare Staffing](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/): Registered nurses (RGN, RMN, RNLD), healthcare assistants, support workers, social workers, occupational therapists, and physiotherapists. Available for single shifts, long-term contracts, and short-notice cover around the clock.

## About

- [About Horizon Care Services](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/about/): Our approach to staffing, compliance, and working with commissioning organisations.
- [Work For Us](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/work-for-us/): Join our register — flexible agency work for nurses, allied health professionals, and support workers across England.

## Contact

- Phone: 020 3757 2767 (Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm)
- Email: contact@horizoncareservices.org
- Office: 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Cheetham Hill, Manchester, M8 9LR
- Service areas: Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Cambridgeshire, Hertfordshire, Manchester, London — and broader England on request
